BU0/2/90-fH.*r.3qT.S*l,] -2358 GI/91 (1) -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA ; EXTRAORDINARY [PART 11—SEC 3(i)] MINISTRY OF FINANCE (Department of Revenue) ORDER New Delhi, the 12th September, 1991 G.S.R, 578(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by Subjection (1) of Section 10 of the Prevention of Illicit Traffic in Narcotic Drugs and Psychotropic Substances Act, 1988 (46 of 1988), the Centra) Government hereby specially empowers Shri Tarun Roy, Additional Secretary to the Government of India for the purpose of the said Section.
